sentences.target: Tu peux payer la facture en ligne.
sentences.reading: /ty pø pa.je la fak.tyʁ ɑ̃ liɲ/

translations.fr: Tu peux payer la facture en ligne.
translations.ipa: /ty pø pa.je la fak.tyʁ ɑ̃ liɲ/
translations.en: You can pay the bill online.
translations.es: Puedes pagar la factura en línea.
translations.de: Du kannst die Rechnung online bezahlen.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以在网上支付账单。
translations.pt: Você pode pagar a conta online.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể thanh toán hóa đơn trực tuyến.
translations.nl: Je kunt de rekening online betalen.
translations.hu: A számlát online ki tudod fizetni.
translations.hi: आप बिल ऑनलाइन भुगतान कर सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορείς να πληρώσεις τον λογαριασμό διαδικτυακά.
translations.nb: Du kan betale regningen på nettet.
translations.id: Kamu bisa membayar tagihan secara online.
translations.sv: Du kan betala fakturan på nätet.
translations.da: Du kan betale regningen på nettet.
translations.ja: オンラインで請求書を支払えます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal), core argument of the clause.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of the modal verb 'pouvoir', expressing ability.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'peux' in a modal+infinitive construction.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'facture'.
Concrete noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'payer'.
Preposition introducing the PP 'en ligne', used adverbially to mean 'online'.
Noun completing the prepositional phrase 'en ligne' (adverbial modifier).

translations.en: I'm waiting for the plumber's invoice.
translations.es: Estoy esperando la factura del fontanero.
translations.de: Ich warte auf die Rechnung vom Klempner.
translations.pt: Estou esperando a fatura do encanador.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chờ hóa đơn của thợ sửa ống nước.
translations.nl: Ik wacht op de factuur van de loodgieter.
translations.hi: मैं प्लंबर की इनवॉइस का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg venter på fakturaen fra rørleggeren.
translations.id: Saya sedang menunggu faktur dari tukang ledeng.
translations.da: Jeg venter på regningen fra blikkenslageren.
translations.ja: 配管工の請求書を待っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular, present indicative of 'attendre'; subject clitic 'j'' attached by elision before a vowel-initial verb.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'facture'.
Concrete noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'J'attends'.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le'; introduces a nominal complement ('of the plumber') modifying 'facture'.
Noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du' specifying the source/provider of the invoice.

sentences.target: On a perdu la facture originale.

translations.fr: On a perdu la facture originale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把原始发票弄丢了。
translations.yue: 我哋唔見咗原本嘅發票。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đã làm mất hóa đơn gốc.
translations.nl: We zijn de originele factuur kwijt.
translations.hi: हमने मूल इनवॉइस खो दी है.
translations.nb: Vi har mistet den opprinnelige fakturaen.
translations.da: Vi har mistet den originale faktura.
translations.ja: 元の請求書をなくしました。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; indefinite/colloquial equivalent of 'nous'.
Auxiliary verb 'avoir', 3rd person singular, forming the passé composé.
Past participle; main lexical verb in the compound past with 'a'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'facture'.
Concrete noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'perdu'.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'facture'.

sentences.target: Je dois envoyer cette facture au service.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa ɑ̃.vwa.je sɛt fak.tyʁ o sɛʁ.vis/

translations.fr: Je dois envoyer cette facture au service.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa ɑ̃.vwa.je sɛt fak.tyʁ o sɛʁ.vis/
translations.en: I have to send this invoice to the department.
translations.es: Tengo que enviar esta factura al departamento.
translations.de: Ich muss diese Rechnung an die Abteilung schicken.
translations.it: Devo inviare questa fattura al dipartimento.
translations.zh-Hans: 我得把这张发票发给部门。
translations.yue: 我要將呢張發票交畀部門。
translations.ru: Мне нужно отправить этот счёт в отдел.
translations.pt: Eu tenho que enviar esta fatura para o departamento.
translations.he: עליי לשלוח את החשבונית הזו למחלקה.
translations.vi: Tôi phải gửi hóa đơn này cho phòng ban.
translations.ar: عليّ أن أرسل هذه الفاتورة إلى القسم.
translations.nl: Ik moet deze factuur naar de afdeling sturen.
translations.uk: Мені потрібно надіслати цей рахунок у відділ.
translations.hu: Ezt a számlát el kell küldenem a részlegnek.
translations.hi: मुझे यह इनवॉइस विभाग को भेजना है.
translations.pl: Muszę wysłać tę fakturę do działu.
translations.el: Πρέπει να στείλω αυτό το τιμολόγιο στο τμήμα.
translations.nb: Jeg må sende denne fakturaen til avdelingen.
translations.id: Saya harus mengirim faktur ini ke departemen.
translations.sv: Jag måste skicka den här fakturan till avdelningen.
translations.ro: Trebuie să trimit această factură la departament.
translations.cs: Musím poslat tuto fakturu na oddělení.
translations.da: Jeg skal sende denne faktura til afdelingen.
translations.fi: Minun pitää lähettää tämä lasku osastolle.
translations.ja: この請求書を部署に送らないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of modal 'devoir', expressing obligation.
Infinitive verb complement of 'dois' (modal+infinitive construction).
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; specifies 'facture'.
Concrete noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'envoyer'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition marking destination/recipient, introducing the PP.
Noun; object of the preposition 'au', indicating the receiving department.
